docs.title: Chippy Documentation
docs.text: Chippy is a modular framework for SoC design and testing that supports lighter-weight, more reusable flows than full Chipyard.

docs.title: Goal
docs.text: Set up Chippy locally and run a minimal example.

docs.title: Prerequisites
docs.text:
You will need:

  • Git
  • A Java Development Kit (JDK)
  • Network access to fetch Git submodules and Scala dependencies

docs.title: 2. Initialize submodules
docs.text:
Chippy depends on these submodules, which we must initialize to build anything

git submodule update --init --recursive

docs.title: Next steps
docs.text: This page will become the main quickstart for new users.
